mca.books.death.author: Ozzie the Warrior
mca.books.death.0: §fI couldn't count how many times me family has been blown t' pieces by creepers. How be they still around, ye may ask? Easy! I, dear reader, 'ave discovered a cure fer death itself! 'n through dis book, I can share it wit' ye.
mca.books.death.1: §f§lGraves§r§f §r§fWhen a villager dies, his corpse be buried in the nearest grave. So make sure t' keep a plot in yer graveyard empty.
mca.books.death.2: §f§lSummonin' Grim§r§f Unfortunately, the only entity capable o' defeatin' death be death itself: the Grim Reaper. T' summon 'im, ye must build an altar consistin' o' 3 obsidian columns dat be at least 2 blocks high. They may be higher if ye like.
mca.books.death.3: §f§lSummonin' Grim 2§r§f In the center ye 'ave t' place the sacrifice, an emerald block.
mca.books.death.4: §f§lSummonin' Grim 3§r§f Aft buildin' the altar, wait 'til night 'n light all 3 columns. When ye're ready t' fight, light the emerald block 'n run!
mca.books.death.5: §f§lFightin' Grim§r§f Grim be tough. Use full diamond armor, lots o' potions, 'n lots o' enchantments. He can: - Fly - Block attacks - Blind ye - Move yer items - Teleport
mca.books.death.6: §f§lFightin' Grim 2§r§f If ye hit Grim while he's blockin', he will teleport behind ye 'n strike. Do nah try t' use arrows or poison, he be immune!
mca.books.death.7: §f§lFightin' Grim 3§r§f When Grim loses too much health he will teleport into the air 'n begin healin'. While healin', he will summon his minions from the underworld t' fight ye.
mca.books.death.8: §f§lFightin' Grim 4§r§f When Grim be healed, he will continue attackin' ye, but he won't be able t' heal again fer 3 minutes 'n 30 seconds. Each time Grim heals, he will nah be able t' restore as much health as he did previously.
mca.books.death.9: §f§lThe Scythe§r§f Once ye land the lethal hit, he falls back into the void 'n leaves his Scythe behind. The Scythe, feelin' ice cold on touch, be a mighty tool. Strike down a villager t' charge the scythe, then transfer the stored soul t' the gravestone.
mca.books.death.10: §f§lThe Scythe 2§r§f But yer heartie will rise infected, as the time underground left some marks. Ye can like enough heal 'im somehow, me bucko Redbeard Richard once scribed a book about dis topic.
mca.books.death.11: §f§lStaff O' Life§r§f Howe'er, thar be another, more peaceful solution. The Staff o' Life! Instead o' a poor soul, it uses the Nether Stars concentrated power t' revive.
mca.books.death.12: §f§lStaff O' Life 2§r§f The Staff be a powerful item dat can revive maties. Unlike the Scythe, 'tis even capable o' erasin' any sickness from the revived scallywag.
mca.books.romance.author: Gerry the Librarian
mca.books.romance.0: §lIntroduction§r Interaction be key t' buildin' relationships 'n findin' the love o' yer life. I've happily written dis book in order t' share me knowledge o' interaction, love, 'n, unfortunately, divorce, t' any scallywag who may needs a wee push in starb'rd direction.
mca.books.romance.1: §lPersonalities§r When speakin' t' any villager, ye'll notice they 'ave a personality. Pay close attention t' dis! Some maties like jokes more, some love a hug. Some personalities be more obvious than others. Hover o'er the personality t' see some hints.
mca.books.romance.2: §lMoods§r Every matey has a mood, which be always apparent when speakin' t' 'em. Moods can change throughout the day, 'n determine how likely a villager be t' like cer'ain interactions.
mca.books.romance.3: §lMoods 2§r The death o' a villager seems t' put those nearby in bad moods. Taxin' also gradually decreases the moods o' everyone. Gifts 'n successful interactions be known t' boost moods.
mca.books.romance.4: §lInteractin'§r Choose wisely when interactin' wit' a villager, based on thar mood 'n personality! If choosin' a romantic interaction, be sure dat the villager ye be natterin' t' likes ye a lot.
mca.books.romance.5: §lInteractin' pt. 2§r Don't be annoyin'! Natterin' t' some rogue fer too long will bore 'em, 'n yer interactions may stop succeedin'. If dis happens, simply wait some time afore tryin' t' natter t' 'em again.
mca.books.romance.6: §lGifts§r Gifts be another great way t' win some rogue's friendship. But again, be careful who ye gift wha'. A fisherman loves fish, but oh me, don't ever gift a smelly fish t' a noble lady.
mca.books.romance.7: §lMarriage§r T' get married, simply gift a villager a weddin' ring once ye feel ye 'ave reached the highest relationship level.
mca.books.romance.8: §lDivorce§r Unfortunately, sometimes 'tis best t' split from yer spouse 'n move on. T' do dis, look fer a cleric t' get divorce papers. Then natter t' yer spouse.
mca.books.romance.9: §lDivorce pt. 2§r Alternatively ye can end the marriage without papers, they will nah be happy tho.
mca.books.family.author: Leanne the Cleric
mca.books.family.0: Sprogs, be our future! Make sure t' 'ave as many as ye possibly can.§rNot only do ye get t' experience the joy o' raisin' a sprog, but once they be past the sprog stage, put 'em t' work!
mca.books.family.1: §lBabies§r When ye be married, simply approach yer spouse 'n offer t' 'Procreate'. Aft a short dance, ye'll be the proud owner o' a new sprog young swabbie or poppet (or maybe even both)!
mca.books.family.2: §lGrowth§r Wee maties take time t' grow, make sure t' hold 'em 'til they be ready, or give 'em t' yer spouse t' take care o'. Once a sprog be ready t' grow, ye may place it on the ground 'n 'twill grow into a sprog!
mca.books.family.3: §lAdolescence§r Wee maties will grow slowly. Howe'er, the magical properties o' Golden Apples be said t' accelerate any sprog's growth. I 'ave yet t' try dis meself.
mca.books.family.4: §lChores§r Any sprog can farm, cut wood, hunt, 'n fish. Ye'll needs t' provide 'em wit' the tools they needs t' do so. If a tool breaks 'n the sprog doesn't 'ave another, they will 'ave no choice but t' stop workin'.
mca.books.family.5: §lAdulthood§r As sad as it may be, wee maties will eventually grow into adults.. Adults can be married off by usin' Matchmaker's Rings, or they will eventually get married on thar owns.
mca.books.rose_gold.author: Wreckage William the Miner
mca.books.rose_gold.0: §lWarnin'! TOP SECRET§r Dis manual be the property o' Windswept William Minin' Co.§rIf ye be nah a Whirlpool William Minin' Co. employee, please refrain from readin' dis manual 'n return promptly t' Windswept William the Miner.
mca.books.rose_gold.1: Ah, rose gold - a lovely combination o' copper 'n gold dat smelts into a pinkish-orange metal. Most use it as an alternative t' gold fer craftin' rings as 'tis much less expensive. Howe'er, it has some interestin' qualities dat be easy t' miss.
mca.books.rose_gold.2: §lCreatin' Ingots§r Crush some raw gold 'n copper ore t' obtain a blend, which already shares the pinkish color o' rose gold. Then, smelt the blend in the blast furnace 'n cast it into an ingot.
mca.books.rose_gold.3: §Usage§r Raucous Rose gold be a mighty soft metal, so 'tisn't suitable fer tools or armor. Howe'er, it makes fer a great material fer rings. Or rose gold blocks, if ye're into dat.
mca.books.infection.author: Riptide Richard the Zombie
mca.books.infection.0: Good, day, readers! I've written dis book so dat ye may nah end up sufferin' the same fate as I. Although I caught scurvy, I was luckily able t' keep all o' me mental faculties.
mca.books.infection.1: §lWhat be scurvy?§r I discovered a long time ago dat the zombies dat appear at night were once villagers! Newly infected villagers slowly turn green, feel unwell 'n may be unable t' speak properly!
mca.books.infection.2: §lCurin'§r Contrary t' popular belief, any infected villager can be cured. Gift a villager a golden apple t' cure an ongoin' infection. If scurvy turned the villager into a zombie already ye must first weaken the zombie wit' a potion, then apply the golden apple.
mca.books.infection.3: §lCurin' 2§r Any other zombies ye see unfortunately be too far gone, 'n can nah be cured.
mca.books.infection.4: §lCurin' 3§r Zombies will take a couple o' minutes t' be fully cured. Villagers who were recently infected, though, 'n haven't had time t' degrade into a full zombie, will be cured instantly!
mca.books.infection.5: §lWarnings§r Villagers be mighty susceptible t' infection, decrease the risk o' infection by buildin' an infirmary!
mca.books.blueprint.author: Cutlass Carl the Builder
mca.books.blueprint.0: §fWe villager can farm. We can smith tools 'n armor. We can read, brew, enchant 'n so much more. But thar be one thing we lack the knowledge fer: construction!
mca.books.blueprint.1: §fOn yer journey, ye prolly come across several villages full o' wee, impractical, 'n barely decorated houses. How shall a village ever evolve into somethin' bigger?
mca.books.blueprint.2: §f§lBlueprint§r§f Dat's why I be wanderin' across the planet, helpin' villages I encounter on me travels. 'n ye could too! Craft yourself a blueprint usin' blue dye 'n paper 'n check out the catalog o' buildings every village needs but can nah build on thar owns.
mca.books.blueprint.3: §f§lRequirements§r§f A buildings usually requires a minimum size. Ye can nah jus' plug everythin' into a shed. Then ye 'ave t' make sure dat all the block requirements be fulfilled.
mca.books.blueprint.4: §f§lFinish§r§f Once done, hit 'Add Buildin'' 'n watch how villagers integrate it into the village.
mca.books.blueprint.5: §f§lRanks§r§f But ye don't needs t' be selfless! The more advanced yer village be, the higher yer rank gets. Ever dreamed t' live a life o' a noble? A mayor? Or even a Cap'n?
mca.books.cult_0.author: Lucas the Devotee
mca.books.cult_0.0: A long time ago, a bein' from another world came t' dis planet, sharin' its wisdom as it travels across the land… Dis entity was called Sirben the 99.
mca.books.cult_0.1: Despite good intentions, its knowledge was too much fer our minds t' comprehend, some scallywags didn' listen, but those who did were changed, t' ne'er be the same again…
mca.books.cult_0.2: Thar minds, shattered by the truths Sirben said, became obsessed, 'n they passed “the sacred words” on t' the next generations. Everyone who gains dis erratic behavior receives the “Sirben” trait.
mca.books.cult_0.3: 'til dis day, some maties say they still can hear its whispers…
mca.books.cult_1.author: Eyepatch Evelyn the Seeker
mca.books.cult_1.0: The Sirben cult speaks o' a higher power dat transcends our world, a bein' dat exists beyond our understandin' o' time 'n space.
mca.books.cult_1.1: Through meditation 'n ritual, cultists attempt t' commune wit' dis entity, hopin' t' gain insight into its unknowable nature 'n the secrets o' the universe.
mca.books.cult_1.2: But wit' dis knowledge comes a price - a madness dat grips the mind 'n twists the soul. Those who follow Sirben's teachings must tread smartly, lest they lose themselves in the pursuit o' forbidden truths.
mca.books.cult_1.3: Yet even as the world scoffs at thar beliefs, the cultists remain steadfast in thar devotion. Fer they know dat beyond the veil o' reality lies a realm o' infinite wonder, where the mysteries o' the cosmos be laid bare fer those wit' the courage t' seek 'em.
mca.books.cult_2.author: Barnaby the Adventurer
mca.books.cult_2.0: In order t' summon the ancient cultists, one must perform a ritual at midnight durin' a snowfall. But be warned, 'tis no ordinary ritual - it requires the milk o' a goat!
mca.books.cult_2.1: Dat's right, ye must milk a goat at midnight in the middle o' a snowstorm! It sounds strange, but it's the only way t' wake the ancient cultists from thar slumber.
mca.books.cult_2.2: But be careful, fer these undead cultists be nah t' be taken lightly. They may be aggressive towards ye once awakened, 'n will stop at naught t' protect thar secrets.
mca.books.cult_2.3: If ye're brave enough t' face 'em, though, thar's a chance they'll drop the secret words o' the Sirbens upon thar defeat. 'n wit' those words, ye'll unlock a new level o' understandin' about the mysteries o' dis world 'n beyond.
mca.books.cult_ancient.author: The Ancient Sirbens
mca.letter.condolence: %s, 'tis wit' great regret dat we 'ave t' inform ye o' %s's death. Yers sincerely, the mayor o' %s
mca.books.supporters.author: The Community
